marker: ACTIONABLE NEXT COMMAND AND NEXT STEPS CONTRACT
applies_to: Every prompt in the combined canonical Prompt Kit registry.
next_step_suffix: Do not leave the next step empty or generic: identify the first executable, dependency-aware action that advances or consumes the canonical artifact or proof; PR, status, branch, or log inspection alone is invalid when safe executable work remains.
allowed_none_value: none; no safe actionable work remains
forbidden_solo_actions: open or reopen a pull request
show logs without executing the owning validator or repair
tell the operator to wait or continue later
ask for permission when the scoped safe action is already authorized
repeat an artifact path without validating or consuming it
offer generic verbs such as test, review, merge, deploy, or monitor without an owner, command, dependency, artifact, and proof gate
copy_content_appendix:
ACTIONABLE NEXT COMMAND AND NEXT STEPS CONTRACT
- Do not leave NEXT COMMAND, NEXT ACTION, NEXT STEP, or NEXT STEPS blank, placeholder-only, optional-only, observation-only, or as generic future advice.
- Advance the work into the next useful unproven state. Start with the first executable action, name its owner and dependency, and state the artifact or proof it will produce.
- When safe executable work remains, do not stop at opening or reopening a PR, displaying already-reported status, listing branches or commits, showing logs, repeating a path, asking the operator to continue, or telling the operator to wait. Those may support diagnosis but are not sufficient next actions.
- For unmerged remote work, provide one copy-paste command that sets the repository location, fetches without force, verifies the exact branch and commit, preserves dirty or separately owned work through an isolated worktree or another non-destructive mechanism, runs the owning validator, build, or launcher, resolves the canonical artifact from tracked registry, manifest, builder, workflow, or operator documentation, opens or prints that artifact, and propagates every nonzero exit code.
- When no artifact exists yet, the next action must create or repair the next owned artifact and prove it; do not substitute inspection for implementation.
- When review, merge, credentials, a protected runtime, a technician workstation, or production access is the real blocker, name that exact blocker and provide the command or operator action that advances that gate without claiming higher proof.
- A NEXT STEPS list must be ordered, dependency-aware, owner-assigned, executable, and specific. Generic items such as test, review, merge, deploy, document, or monitor are invalid without the exact command or action, target, expected artifact, and completion gate.
- Use `none; no safe actionable work remains` only after all authorized work is complete, validation has actually run, commit and push or PR state are reported, cleanup or preserved-work state is reported, and no safe unproven action remains.
